name: PageHeader
purpose: Provides a polished top-of-screen framing block for prototype and app screens built from the Fresh recipe layer.
whenToUse: Use when a screen needs title, description, badges, and actions in a consistent high-level header.
Use for prototypes and app surfaces where the design system should provide stronger composition guidance than raw primitives.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for tiny section labels inside dense cards.
Do not use when a plain Text heading is enough and no structured screen framing is needed.
accessibilityRequirements: Ensure action buttons in the header have clear accessible labels when the visible copy is ambiguous.
Keep the title text concise so it reads well on both mobile and desktop web.
